series_metadata.series_title: Credit Union Guaranty Corporation Quarterly Reports
series_metadata.series_description: These record series contains the quarterly reports submitted to the Division of Financial Institutions by a credit union guaranty corporation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until next examination, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
